raw_request: Provide the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9, including the measurement definition and applicable evaluation window.
intent: Bot-adjusted 30-day retention is one of the two controlling release criteria, whereas the visible raw retention is not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9 only; bot-adjusted 30-day retention for the release evaluation period.
expected_value_basis: A verified rate below 10% would rule out release, while a rate at or above 10% would satisfy the retention prong and make eligible sample size the remaining controlling criterion.
